extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR attacked solo on final descent of Col de la Colombière, gained 5 minutes on GC contenders to take yellow jersey.
tactical_patterns: POGACAR attacked on descent of Col de la Colombière, not summit, unprecedented tactical move that surprised entire peloton.
UAE team appeared weak early allowing POGACAR solo time-gaining strategy rather than traditional team defense of yellow jersey.
POELS attacked on uncategorized first climb to position BAHRAIN for KOM competition, revealing multi-stage KOM tactical planning.
URAN rode defensively doing minimal work while staying in top-10, conserving energy suggests podium ambitions over stage wins.

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: gained 5 minutes on GC rivals in single stage through unprecedented descending attack, now holds overwhelming yellow jersey advantage
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: started strong on Col de Rome then completely blew up, disappointing performance suggests form issues for GC contention
rider_signals.URAN Rigoberto: positive: top-10 time trial plus minimal work output while maintaining GC position indicates smart energy conservation for later stages
rider_signals.POELS Wout: positive: attacked from kilometer zero including uncategorized climbs showing BAHRAIN prioritizing KOM jersey through sustained aggressive positioning
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: lost 5 minutes to POGACAR creating insurmountable white jersey lead, suggesting GC gap already decisive after first mountain stage
